_note: RBAC objects + impersonation. Fully platform-independent: runs in the session namespace against the standard `view` ClusterRole and creates a Role/RoleBinding/SA. Should be all-green on any real OpenShift/k8s session with oc.

steps.run:
oc apply -f - <<'EOF'
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: Role
metadata:
  name: pod-service-viewer
rules:
- apiGroups: [""]
  resources: ["pods", "services", "configmaps"]
  verbs: ["get", "list", "watch"]
EOF
